fields.description: JSON list. Example: ["dashboard", "purchase", "approvals"]. Valid modules: dashboard, executive, sales, collection, purchase, stock, warehouse, quality_control, logistics, approvals, finance, accounting, plantation
fields.label: Modules

fields.description: Optional JSON list of Company names. Empty means use default scope.
fields.label: Company Scope

fields.description: Optional JSON list of Warehouse names. Empty means use default scope.
fields.label: Warehouse Scope
